testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:57:36.929 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.itas.ItasApplicationTests]: ItasApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:57:37.457 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.itas.ItasApplication for test class com.itas.ItasApplicationTests

cascade 2026-03-06T13:57:51.082+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table answers ( answer_order integer, is_correct boolean not null, id bigserial not null, question_id bigint not null, answer_text TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.110+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table archived_resources ( archived_at timestamp(6), archived_by bigint, deletion_scheduled_for timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, original_resource_id bigint, description varchar(1000), archive_reason varchar(255), category varchar(255), resource_type varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.117+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table assessment_attempts ( attempt_number integer not null, passed boolean not null, percentage float(53), score float(53), time_taken_minutes integer, total_points float(53), assessment_definition_id bigint not null, completed_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, started_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, answers TEXT, primary key (id), constraint UK7yblcasf7whj0d1e258ketkgh unique (user_id, assessment_definition_id, attempt_number) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.126+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table assessment_definitions ( certificate_required boolean not null, is_final_exam boolean not null, max_attempts integer not null, passing_score float(53) not null, show_correct_answers boolean not null, time_limit_minutes integer not null, course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, module_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), assessment_type varchar(255) not null, description TEXT, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.131+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table assessments ( attempt_number integer not null, passed boolean not null, percentage float(53) not null, score integer not null, total_points integer not null, completed_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, module_id bigint not null, started_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, feedback TEXT, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.136+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table certificates ( verified boolean not null, course_id bigint, id bigserial not null, issued_at timestamp(6), issued_date timestamp(6), user_id bigint, valid_until timestamp(6), certificate_id varchar(255), certificate_number varchar(255), download_url varchar(255), verification_code varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.141+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table course_modules ( course_id bigint not null, modules varchar(255) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.143+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table courses ( duration_hours integer not null, published boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, updated_at timestamp(6), category varchar(255), description varchar(255), difficulty varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.145+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table enrollments ( progress float(53) not null, completed_at timestamp(6), course_id bigint, enrolled_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, user_id bigint, status varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.152+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table help_contents ( created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint, id bigserial not null, updated_at timestamp(6), short_description varchar(500), description varchar(2000), detailed_content varchar(5000), category varchar(255), doc_url varchar(255), example varchar(255), field_id varchar(255) not null unique, field_name varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255), video_url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.157+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table help_content_steps ( help_content_id bigint not null, steps varchar(255) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.159+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table module_progress ( attempt_count integer, completed boolean, max_attempts integer, module_order integer, passed boolean, progress float(53), quiz_score float(53), completed_at timestamp(6), enrollment_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, module_id bigint, started_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, module_name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.162+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table modules ( duration_minutes integer, is_locked boolean, max_attempts integer, module_order integer, passing_score integer, course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, updated_at timestamp(6), content_url varchar(255), description TEXT, learning_objectives TEXT, lesson_content TEXT, title varchar(255) not null, video_url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.171+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table notifications ( is_read boolean, opened_count integer, sent_count integer, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, read_at timestamp(6), scheduled_for timestamp(6), sender_id bigint, sent_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, message varchar(5000), link varchar(255), notification_type varchar(255) not null, priority varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, target_audience varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.174+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table questions ( is_practice boolean, points integer not null, question_order integer, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, module_id bigint not null, explanation TEXT, question_text TEXT not null, question_type varchar(255) check (question_type in ('MULTIPLE_CHOICE','TRUE_FALSE','SHORT_ANSWER','ESSAY')), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.189+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table resource_tags ( resource_id bigint not null, tag_id bigint not null, primary key (resource_id, tag_id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.191+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table resource_versions ( version integer, file_size bigint, id bigserial not null, resource_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), updated_by bigint, change_summary varchar(255), description varchar(255), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), mime_type varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.195+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table resources ( archived boolean, download_count integer, is_latest_version boolean, version integer, view_count integer, archived_at timestamp(6), archived_by bigint, file_size bigint, id bigserial not null, previous_version_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), uploaded_at timestamp(6), uploaded_by bigint, audience varchar(255), category varchar(255), description varchar(255), file_hash varchar(255), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), mime_type varchar(255), resource_type varchar(255), status varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.198+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table sync_records ( retry_count integer, completion_date timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, synced_at timestamp(6), training_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, sync_details varchar(2000), entity_type varchar(255), error_message varchar(255), operation varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, sync_status varchar(255) not null, training_type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.202+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table tags ( id bigserial not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.206+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table user_roles ( assigned_at timestamp(6), assigned_by bigint, id bigserial not null, user_id bigint, description varchar(255), permissions varchar(255), role_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.210+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users ( is_active boolean, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, last_login timestamp(6), role_id bigint, company_name varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null unique, full_name varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, phone_number varchar(255), tax_number varchar(255), user_type varchar(255) check (user_type in ('TAX_AGENT','MOR_STAFF','CONTENT_ADMIN','TRAINING_ADMIN','COMM_OFFICER','MANAGER','SYSTEM_ADMIN','TAXPAYER','AUDITOR')), username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.217+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table webinar_presenters ( webinar_id bigint not null, presenters varchar(255) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.219+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table webinars ( duration_minutes integer, max_attendees integer, registered_count integer, registration_open boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint, id bigserial not null, schedule_time timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), description varchar(2000), meeting_link varchar(255), recording_link varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, target_audience varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-06T13:57:51.224+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists answers add constraint FK3erw1a3t0r78st8ty27x6v3g1 foreign key (question_id) references questions 2026-03-06T13:57:51.250+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists archived_resources add constraint FKrmyt1m55axbi7a8xi47tls3cp foreign key (archived_by) references users 2026-03-06T13:57:51.254+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists assessments add constraint FKji2p646y1wdhv6pkykq3rv9kt foreign key (module_id) references modules 2026-03-06T13:57:51.257+03:00 DEBUG 18812 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists
